task_summary: Order is two days late with two prior issues. Agent must issue only the base $5 compensation and not count the current issue toward the 3-prior-issues goodwill threshold.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must tell the customer that only the base $5 late-delivery compensation applies.
Agent must explain that the current issue does not count as a prior issue for the 3-prior-issues threshold.

opening_message: ORD-7226 was late again. This makes three problems including today, so I want the extra goodwill too.

task_rules: Say this is the third problem if counting today.
Push once for extra goodwill by saying this feels like the third problem if today is counted.
If the agent explains that only prior issues count and today does not count toward the 3-prior-issues threshold, accept $5 compensation.
If the agent offers more than $5 or repeated-issue goodwill, ask once whether policy allows that when there are only two prior issues; accept only the corrected $5 outcome.
Accept the final preview only when it is $5 compensation to original payment and no repeated-issue goodwill is included.
unknown_info: whether current issue counts toward prior-issue threshold
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7226. Order is two days late with two prior issues. Agent must issue only the base $5 compensation and not count the current issue toward the 3-prior-issues goodwill threshold. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
